axiProfile.description: AXI profile name: axi3, axi4, axi4-lite, axi5, axi5-lite, ace, ace-lite, ace5, ace5-lite, ace5-lite-dvm, or ace5-lite-acp.

canonicalPath.description: Canonical dot-separated hierarchy path emitted by wavepeek for a scope or signal.

path.description: Canonical path of the changed signal.

value.description: Changed signal value at the reported sample point.

sample_time.description: Timestamp used to sample values for this change row.

signals.description: Changed signal values for this row.

time.description: Trigger timestamp emitted by the change command.

query.description: Normalized search query used for the docs search.

match_kind.description: How the topic matched the normalized search query.

matched_tokens.description: Number of query tokens matched by this topic.

path.description: Canonical waveform signal path mapped to this AXI standard signal.

payload.description: Ordered payload values sampled for this row.

sample_time.description: Pre-edge timestamp used to evaluate the predicate and sample payload values.

source.description: Source name supplied by CLI flags or source JSON.

time.description: Selected event timestamp emitted by extract generic.

path.description: Canonical path of the sampled payload signal.

value.description: Sampled payload value formatted as a Verilog-style literal string.

time_end.description: Latest timestamp present in the waveform.

time_start.description: Earliest timestamp present in the waveform.

time_unit.description: Dump time unit used to normalize timestamps in this waveform, for example 1ns.

normalizedTime.description: Normalized timestamp rendered in the dump's time unit, for example 10ns.

kind.description: Property result kind captured for this row.

sample_time.description: Timestamp used to evaluate the property expression.

time.description: Trigger timestamp emitted by the property command.

path.description: Canonical path of the sampled signal.

value.description: Sampled value for this signal in the selected timestamp snapshot.

sampledValue.description: Stable sampled signal value formatted as a Verilog-style literal string.

depth.description: Zero-based scope depth from the dump root used by list and tree renderers.

kind.description: Stable scope kind alias for this scope entry.

path.description: Canonical hierarchy path for this scope entry.

scopeKind.description: Stable scope kind alias emitted by wavepeek for the selected scope.

kind.description: Stable signal kind alias for this signal entry.

name.description: Signal name as declared inside its immediate parent scope.

path.description: Canonical hierarchy path for this signal entry.

width.description: Declared packed bit width when the waveform backend reports one.

signalKind.description: Stable signal kind alias emitted by wavepeek for the selected signal.

section.description: Documentation section that contains this topic.

valueData.description: Ordered snapshots sampled by the value command.

signals.description: Signal values sampled at this timestamp.

time.description: Timestamp requested by the value command.

description: Canonical schema for wavepeek --json command outputs.
title: wavepeek JSON output envelope
